programHistory.coachMcQuaid: FHSAA Hall of Fame Coach Pat McQuaid coached the Titans from 1974-2024. A Nova HS alum himself (Class of '68), he built the program into a South Florida powerhouse.
programHistory.currentCoach: Head Coach Brian Luebkert leads the 2026 Titans
programHistory.facility: 1,000-seat stadium with indoor batting cages, fieldhouse, press box, and state-of-the-art digital scoreboard — built with community support after Hurricane Irma

championships.title: District Champion, Regional Champion & Sectional Champion
District Champion, Regional Champion & Sectional Champion

news2026.title: HSBN Honors Outgoing Nova Seniors
news2026.summary: HSBN honors the four graduating seniors closing out their high school careers: #6 Musa Adeoye, #11 JJ Cohen-Rodriguez, #25 Ricky Relyea, and #15 Brock Burns.

news2026.title: Nova On A Revenge Tour In 2026
news2026.summary: The Titans started last season 6-0 before faltering late. In 2026, they're looking to put a full season together in the quest for their first district title since 2023. Manager Brian Luebkert and team leaders share their expectations at HSBN Media Day.

seasonPreview: After starting 6-0 last season before faltering late, the 2026 Titans are on a revenge tour — chasing their first district title since 2023. Head Coach Brian Luebkert and his squad are building on a legacy that includes 2 state championships, a national title, and MLB alumni like Michael Morse.
mcQuaidQuote: Your objective shouldn't be just to win a state championship. It should be, are you going to make the place when you leave better than when you came? Start your job like you're gonna be there forever and make it better.
